reviewers.justification: The proposal lacks a defined hypothesis and, critically, any baseline for comparison, making it impossible to evaluate the proposed method's effectiveness. Furthermore, the absence of details on reproducibility (seeds) and computational cost prevents a rigorous assessment of the work.
